message:
🌱 Add vault: add telemetry to vault agent mission (#1110)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-8649-add-telemetry-to-vault-agent",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: add telemetry to vault agent",
+    "description": "add telemetry to vault agent. Requested by 32+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nWe need a way to monitor vault agent. Currently if it fails to renew a lease, not authenticate with vault or retrieve a token, we dont know about it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for add telemetry to vault agent",
+        "description": "This patch adds a new `/agent/v1/metrics` that will return metrics on the\nrunning Vault agent. Configuration is done using the same telemetry\nstanza than the Vault server. For now default runtime metrics are\nreturned with a few additional ones specific to the agent:\n  - `vault.agent.auth.failure` and `vault.agent.auth.success` to monitor\n  the correct behavior of the auto auth mechanism\n  - `vault.agent.proxy.success`, `vault.agent.proxy.client_error` and\n  `vault.agent.proxy.error` to check\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"add telemetry to vault agent\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This patch adds a new `/agent/v1/metrics` that will return metrics on the\nrunning Vault agent. Configuration is done using the same telemetry\nstanza than the Vault server.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
